name: body_exposure_standalone
description: Single tag-toggle node — verifies node loads, accepts BOOLEAN inputs, and emits OUTPUT_NODE preview text via /history.
expect: nude

name: exposure_through_tags_merge
description: Wires a tag bundle into TagsMerge — verifies the CUUN_TAGS socket type and merge resolution work end-to-end.
expect: nude
nude

name: meta_pony
description: Pony-specific preset — verifies BOOLEAN score / rating / source toggles compose into a CUUN_TAGS bundle with a previewable text.
expect: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, rating_safe, source_anime, 1girl

name: three_presets_through_merge
description: Mirrors the text portion of example_workflows/character_pipeline.json — three preset bundles fanning into TagsMerge.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors, smile, grin, happy, sparkling_eyes, open_mouth, :d, blush_stickers, shrine, outdoors, afternoon, miko, hakama, looking_at_viewer, smile

name: character_preset
description: Preset combo selector — verifies COMBO with a non-trivial value list resolves to expected tags.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors

name: tag_decorate_color
description: TagsDecorate prefixes a clothing.bottoms tag from a CharacterPreset bundle with colors emitted by ColorPalette. Verifies the tag-category registry resolves preset-emitted tags and the decoration phrase is correctly composed.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, red green pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: tag_decorate_auto_broadcast
description: TagsExplode fans out 3 single-color bundles into TagsDecorate.decoration. TagsDecorate runs once per element (1 bundle × 3 colors = 3) and emits 3 prompts, each prefixing pleated_skirt with one color.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, red pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, green pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, blue pleated skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: tag_decorate_two_lists_cross_product
description: TagsDecorate sets INPUT_IS_LIST=True and iterates bundle × decoration internally. 3 tops × 3 colors → 9 prompts covering every (top, color) pair (red shirt / blue shirt / green shirt / red blouse / ... / blue hoodie).
expect: red shirt
green shirt
blue shirt
red blouse
green blouse
blue blouse
red hoodie
green hoodie
blue hoodie

name: tag_decorate_chained_multiplies_axes
description: Two TagsDecorate nodes chained back-to-back. Stage 1 decorates clothing.bottoms with 3 colors (1×3 = 3). Stage 2 decorates clothing.tops with 2 patterns (3×2 = 6 total prompts). Verifies that the list output of stage 1 flows correctly into the `bundle` of stage 2 and multiplies.
expect: plaid shirt, red pleated skirt
checkered shirt, red pleated skirt
plaid shirt, green pleated skirt
checkered shirt, green pleated skirt
plaid shirt, blue pleated skirt
checkered shirt, blue pleated skirt

name: tag_decorate_three_axis_chain
description: The full-stack sanity check. Base = CharacterPreset(serafuku_schoolgirl). Three TagsDecorate stages each pick a different target category and a different decoration source, multiplying to 3 × 2 × 2 = 12 prompts. Verifies (a) chained list propagation across three stages, (b) per-stage category targeting hits ALL tags belonging to that category (the clothing.uniform stage decorates BOTH serafuku and sailor_collar — they share the category — while leaving everything else untouched), (c) underscore-to-space replacement on multi-word decoration tags (polka_dot → polka dot), and (d) the full set of 12 outputs is exactly the Cartesian product in (skirt × top × legwear) iteration order.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, red pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, red pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, red pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, red pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, green pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, green pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, green pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, green pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, white serafuku, white sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, striped thighhighs, loafers
long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, navy serafuku, navy sailor collar, blue pleated skirt, polka dot thighhighs, loafers

name: tags_filter_drops_registry_category
description: TagsFilter targets clothing.legwear and drops the `thighhighs` tag from inside CharacterPreset(serafuku_schoolgirl)'s preset.X selection. Verifies registry-based per-tag filtering on a preset bundle (not selection-category-based), and that the surrounding tags survive.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, loafers

name: tags_filter_chain_drops_multiple_categories
description: Two TagsFilter nodes in series drop two different registry categories (legwear, then footwear) from the same preset. Verifies the documented multi-category pattern (chain nodes rather than multi-select UI).
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt

name: tags_shuffle_deterministic
description: TagsShuffle reorders tags within each TaggedSelection deterministically per seed. CharacterPreset(miko) emits one selection of 8 tags; with seed=42 the shuffled order must match Python's random.Random(42).shuffle reference output.
expect: miko, hakama, zouri, shrine_outdoors, bangs, tabi, long_hair, black_hair

name: bundle_inspector_kept_only
description: TagsBundleInspector renders a merged bundle grouped by layer/category. With no conflicts, the dropped section is omitted.
expect:
[exposure]
  body.exposure : nude

name: bundle_inspector_with_dropped
description: TagsBundleInspector appends a `--- dropped ---` section when TagsMerge.warnings carries conflict info. `nude` triggers TAG_CONFLICTS to drop the `shirt` tag from ClothingTops.
expect:
[exposure]
  body.exposure : nude

--- dropped ---
conflict: dropped ['shirt'] from 'clothing.tops' (triggered by ['nude'])

name: text_concat_break_attribute_binding
description: Color/attribute binding pattern: each tag source's bundle goes through its own TagsMerge to produce a STRING, then TextConcat joins them with ' BREAK ' to isolate attention chunks so e.g. tops/bottoms colors don't bleed across attributes. Demonstrates that the existing TagsMerge+TextConcat composition covers the BREAK-grouping use case.
expect: shirt BREAK pleated_skirt BREAK plaid

name: text_concat_break_two_characters
description: Multi-character pattern: each CharacterPreset's bundle goes through its own TagsMerge → STRING, then TextConcat joins them with ' BREAK ', producing one BREAK-separated chunk per subject. Spatial positioning is still the encoder/sampler's job (smZ / Regional Prompter / Attention Couple) — this only handles the prompt-builder side.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors BREAK long_hair, black_hair, bangs, hair_ribbon, serafuku, sailor_collar, pleated_skirt, thighhighs, loafers

name: text_concat_break_grouped_with_per_group_merge
description: Multi-source-per-group pattern: each BREAK group is pre-composed by its own TagsMerge (so mutex/conflicts resolve within the group), then the per-group prompt STRINGs are joined with TextConcat / ' BREAK '. Verifies that the standard pipeline composes correctly when groups need internal conflict resolution before isolation.
expect: long_hair, black_hair, bangs, miko, hakama, tabi, zouri, shrine_outdoors, smile, grin, happy, sparkling_eyes, open_mouth, :d, blush_stickers BREAK shrine, outdoors, afternoon, miko, hakama, looking_at_viewer, smile

name: aspect_ratio_preset_landscape
description: AspectRatioPreset emits (width, height) INTs and a `WxH` UI preview. Verifies the node loads from the new `nodes/image/` subpackage and surfaces dimensions in the expected format.

name: aspect_ratio_preset_swap_to_portrait
description: `swap=true` flips a landscape preset to portrait — verifies the swap toggle ends up reflected in the UI preview text (and therefore the INT outputs).

name: tags_random_pick_deterministic
description: TagsRandomPick flattens every non-extra selection and samples `count` tags using `seed`. CharacterPreset(miko)'s 8 tags with count=3, seed=7 must produce Python's random.Random(7).sample(...) reference output.
expect: tabi, black_hair, miko

name: pony_sdxl_pipeline_positive
description: Mirrors the positive text chain of example_workflows/pony_sdxl_pipeline.json — MetaPony prefix (scores + rating + source + extra) layered with character / personality / situation / quality presets through TagsMerge.
expect: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up, rating_safe, source_anime, 1girl, solo, very_long_hair, purple_hair, witch, witch_hat, long_dress, thighhighs, boots, smug, grin, looking_at_viewer, hand_on_own_hip, determined, beach, ocean, outdoors, noon, sunny, swimsuit, wind_lift, looking_at_viewer, masterpiece, best_quality, very_aesthetic

name: pony_sdxl_pipeline_negative
description: Mirrors the negative text chain of example_workflows/pony_sdxl_pipeline.json — BadQuality (fidelity negatives) merged with BadGeneral (anatomy negatives).
expect: worst_quality, low_quality, normal_quality, bad_quality, lowres, jpeg_artifacts, compression_artifacts, blurry, watermark, signature, username, artist_name, text, logo, error, chromatic_aberration, artistic_error, bad_anatomy, anatomical_nonsense, bad_proportions, bad_perspective, bad_reflection, bad_multiple_views, bad_shadow, bad_gun_anatomy, bad_vehicle_anatomy, bad_internal_anatomy

name: count_extract_from_merged_prompt
description: TagsExtractSubjectCount parses subject-count tags out of an assembled prompt. CharacterPreset(miko) carries no count tag, so a count is injected via MetaCountGirls + MetaCountBoys, merged to a STRING, then extracted — verifying the STRING round-trips through TagsMerge into the parser and the preview reports the total.
expect: 3 subject(s): 2girls, 1boy

name: shared_seed_drives_random_pick
description: Seed emits one INT (with control-after-generate in the UI) wired into TagsRandomPick. Verifies the seed node loads from nodes/util/ and that its INT output drives a downstream seeded node deterministically (seed=7 over miko's 8 tags reproduces the random.Random(7) reference).
expect: tabi, black_hair, miko
